articles.author: Gayoung Lee
articles.title: Archaeologists Just Found the Earliest Known Named Scientist in the Ancient Americas - Gizmodo
articles.description: Scientists have long known that the Maya were great thinkers—and we may finally have at least one name to credit.
articles.content: In 2010, archaeologist David Stuart and colleagues ran into a painted chamber at Xultun, a Maya relic in modern-day Guatemala. Then the team noticed that the many mathematical and astronomical formul… [+3695 chars]
